"rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/HikePointofSaleAddon2.05T5g00000Wlq2xEAB.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/HikePointofSaleAddon2.05T5g00000Wlq2xEAB.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Staff that use Hike must have a matching username in Neto for the data to sync correctly between systems."}, {"text": "Account credit cannot be increased via Hike."}, {"text": "Gift vouchers issued in Hike cannot be used in Neto, and vice versa."}, {"text": "Sales in Hike for fractions of a unit (e.g. qty of 1.5) will not transfer to Neto."}, {"text": "Orders created in Neto through other sales channels (webstore, eBay, Kogan etc) will not be synced to Hike."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install and Set up the Hike POS Add-on"}], "data-id": "install-and-set-up-the-hike-pos-add-on"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the Hike POS add-on in the Point of Sale section, and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up window to confirm."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Hike POS add-on will be installed. When complete, click the "}, {"text": "Configure Hike POS", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now set up your Hike POS integration by following the steps "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://help.hikeup.com/portal/en/kb/articles/how-to-integrate-neto-with-hike", "children": [{"text": "provided by Hike"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}]
